name: Chile Caribe
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the dried chiles.
2. Dry them thoroughly.
3. Remove the stems from each chili.
4. Crush or tear the chiles with your hands into small pieces, about 1/2 inch in size.
5. Note that while red pepper flakes are similar to chile caribe and can be found in most supermarkets, they typically have a different flavor profile as they are often made from Italian peppers.
